title: Global Outlook: Our CIOs on Modern Mercantilism, AI, and Managing Money Today
gist: Teaser for a Q4 CIO-call excerpt: Bridgewater's CIOs frame the current regime as defined by AI and 'modern mercantilism' and preview building resilient portfolios. No substantive content beyond the framing in this gated teaser.

insights.claim: Bridgewater's CIOs characterize the current investment regime as defined by AI and 'modern mercantilism', arguing the next chapter of the AI boom is more dangerous.
insights.speaker: Karen Karniol-Tambour, Greg Jensen, Bob Prince, Jim Haskel
insights.so_what: Signals the macro lens a major risk-parity manager is using to position; watch for the full CIO call for the actionable detail this teaser withholds.
insights.quote: Greg discusses our approach to understanding AI and why the next chapter of the AI boom is more dangerous.
insights.locator: Greg discusses our approach to understanding AI
